steps.title: Set the function equal
steps.content:
The question asks when $f(x)$ has a value of $108$. Substitute the function definition into that condition.
$$6(3x+3)=108$$

steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content:
Divide by $6$ first, then isolate $x$ by subtracting $3$ and dividing by $3$.
$$3x+3=18$$
$$3x=15$$
$$x=5$$
The answer is A.
